name: Investor Lead Auto-Briefing
description: On $5M+ investor lead detection, pulls public property records, generates Nemotron one-page brief, attaches to CEO email within 30 minutes of flag.

config.description: Format lead data for brief generation
config.code: output = { lead_name: inputData.name, property_value: inputData.property_value, property_address: inputData.address, zone: inputData.zone, segment: inputData.segment, portfolio_size: inputData.portfolio_size || 'Unknown', contact_method: inputData.preferred_contact, formatted_value: '$' + (parseInt(inputData.property_value) / 1000000).toFixed(1) + 'M' };

payload.prompt: Generate a one-page investor property brief for CEO review. Lead: {{step1.lead_name}}. Property value: {{step1.formatted_value}}. Location: {{step1.property_address}}, {{step1.zone}}. Portfolio size: {{step1.portfolio_size}}. Include: property risk profile for absentee ownership, recommended service tier (Weekly Home Watch at $395/month for properties over $1M), multi-property discount potential, and escalation justification. Format as HEADER, PROPERTY SUMMARY, RISK ASSESSMENT, SERVICE RECOMMENDATION, NEXT STEPS.

config.subject: Investor Brief Ready: {{step1.lead_name}} | {{step1.formatted_value}} | {{step1.zone}}

config.message: INVESTOR BRIEF GENERATED | {{step1.lead_name}} | {{step1.formatted_value}} | {{step1.zone}} | CEO email sent | Awaiting review before WF-3 escalation
